Add a Markdown blog system with a Blog list page and BlogPost detail page. Creates Blog.tsx and BlogPost.tsx pages that fetch .md files from /public/posts/, adds react-markdown and gray-matter dependencies, creates a sample post, registers routes in App.tsx, and adds a Blog nav link in NavBar.tsx. Typography styles are applied via standard Tailwind v4 classes since @tailwindcss/typography is not in the project.
